title: boerhavia elongata
intro: Boerhavia elongata, also known as Red spidering or Red spider plant, is a perennial succulent plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Boerhavia elongata include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive disorders, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Boerhavia elongata include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for the treatment of various health conditions.
